_doc: Scale roadmap seed. Injected into dashboard_data.roadmap at end of onboarding when current_path == 'scale'. All 3 phases ship full deliverables/exit. `expanded:true` on Phase 3 (active). INVARIANT: `here:true` on exactly ONE sub.

subs.name: Step 1a — Survey Design
subs.question: What do users actually feel about the product?
deliverables: Survey link sent to engaged users
subs.exit: Survey is live, link sent to all engaged users.

subs.name: Step 1b — Collection
subs.question: How many responses do we have?

subs.name: Step 1c — Baseline Analysis
subs.question: What is our PMF score and who is our HXC?
subs.exit: Score calculated, HXC extracted, segmentation complete.

subs.name: Step 2 — Roadmap v1
subs.question: What do we build to move the score?
subs.exit: Roadmap has ≥5 initiatives per half, traced to survey data.

subs.name: Operating Mode — Iterate until ≥ 40%
subs.question: Have we reached real product-market fit?
subs.exit: Sean Ellis Score ≥ 40% in 2 consecutive monthly reviews.

subs.name: Find repeatable sales motion
subs.question: Will many people pay?
subs.exit: Same ICP, pain, message, and sales motion repeatedly create paying customers.

subs.name: Prove non-founders can sell
subs.question: Can non-founders sell this?
subs.exit: A non-founder can close customers without the founder.

subs.name: Make it scalable
subs.question: Does this scale?
subs.exit: Sales motion keeps working as volume increases.

subs.name: Ensure customer success
subs.question: Can we scale without churn?
subs.exit: New customers consistently reach value and don't churn.

subs.name: Make it profitable
subs.question: Can we scale profitably?
subs.exit: Growth produces profitable revenue with acceptable CAC, payback, and margin.

subs.name: Hit the gas & scale
subs.question: Does this keep scaling when we hit the gas?
subs.exit: Increasing resources creates more growth without breaking the system.

subs.name: Scale the organization & processes
subs.question: Can the organization handle the growth?
subs.exit: Business operates predictably without every decision flowing through the founder.

subs.name: Expand internationally
subs.question: Can this work in new markets?
subs.exit: At least one new market shows early repeatability.

subs.name: Add additional product lines
subs.question: Can we expand the product without losing focus?
subs.exit: A new product line creates additional revenue without weakening the core.
